Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: I built a tiny LLM to demystify how language models work 315 upvotes, 27 comments
  2. Show HN: Real-time AI (audio/video in, voice out) on an M3 Pro with Gemma E2B 38 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Computational Physics (2nd Edition) (2025) 133 upvotes, 17 comments
  4. Signals, the push-pull based algorithm 14 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. A tail-call interpreter in (nightly) Rust 152 upvotes, 28 comments
  6. Case study: recovery of a corrupted 12 TB multi-device pool 42 upvotes, 5 comments
  7. Rendering arbitrary-scale emojis using the Slug algorithm 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  8. Winners of the 2026 Kokuyo Design Awards 30 upvotes, 3 comments
  9. Gemma 4 on iPhone 559 upvotes, 146 comments
  10. Running Gemma 4 locally with LM Studio's new headless CLI and Claude Code 243 upvotes, 58 comments
  11. Usenet Archives 23 upvotes, 2 comments
  12. Show HN: Gemma Gem – AI model embedded in a browser – no API keys, no cloud 54 upvotes, 9 comments
  13. Eight years of wanting, three months of building with AI 746 upvotes, 224 comments
  14. The Mechanics of Steins Gate (2023) [pdf] 70 upvotes, 14 comments
  15. Media scraper Gallery-dl is moving to Codeberg after receiving a DMCA notice 112 upvotes, 30 comments
  16. Show HN: Modo – I built an open-source alternative to Kiro, Cursor, and Windsurf 38 upvotes, 7 comments
  17. An open-source 240-antenna array to bounce signals off the Moon 54 upvotes, 12 comments
  18. Sheets Spreadsheets in Your Terminal 36 upvotes, 7 comments
  19. LÖVE: 2D Game Framework for Lua 271 upvotes, 105 comments
  20. SideX – A Tauri-based port of Visual Studio Code 15 upvotes, 2 comments
  21. Music for Programming 155 upvotes, 65 comments
  22. Employers use your personal data to figure out the lowest salary you'll accept 166 upvotes, 76 comments
  23. The 1987 game “The Last Ninja” was 40 kilobytes 51 upvotes, 19 comments
  24. One ant for $220: The new frontier of wildlife trafficking 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. Microsoft hasn't had a coherent GUI strategy since Petzold 356 upvotes, 197 comments
  26. Show HN: I made a YouTube search form with advanced filters 194 upvotes, 118 comments
  27. We replaced Node.js with Bun for 5x throughput 42 upvotes, 21 comments
  28. Why Switzerland has 25 Gbit internet and America doesn't 396 upvotes, 291 comments
  29. Artemis II crew see first glimpse of far side of Moon [video] 464 upvotes, 360 comments
  30. In Japan, the robot isn't coming for your job; it's filling the one nobody wants 156 upvotes, 181 comments

Last generated 3:00pm, 6 April 2026. Source here.
